name: Pancakes (Using Wheat Quick Mix)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients and stir until well mixed.
2. Pour batter onto a heated griddle or frying pan.
3. Cook until bubbles form on the surface of the pancakes and the edges start to look set.
4. Flip the pancakes and cook until golden brown on the other side.
5. Repeat with remaining batter.
6. Serve hot. Makes about 16 four-inch pancakes.
